# Cheese Pay

> Cheese Pay is a USD wallet where you can leave your money is stable currencies and spend in local currency of youthe country you live in starting from Nigeria.
>Your username is Also your bank account.
> Send money to anyone using just @theirname — no account numbers,
> no sort codes, no routing numbers. Settle instantly in Naira or USDC.
> Works on Ethereum Wallets and Stellar blockchain.
> Available in Nigeria.

## What Cheese Pay does
- Username-based payments — send money with @username not account numbers
- USDC stablecoin wallet with Naira settlement
- QR code payments for merchants
- Earn yield on idle USDC balance
- Cheese Black tier — zero fees, metal card, invite only
- Cheese Gold tier — higher limits, priority support

## Who it's for
- Nigerians who want to send and receive USD or Naira instantly
- Freelancers getting paid internationally
- Businesses accepting payments without sharing bank details
- Anyone tired of bank transfer friction

## Waitlist
- https://cheesepay.xyz/

## Contact
- https://cheesepay.xyz
